goal_text:
You are looking for the 'Addenbrookes Hospital'. The hospital should have the 'acute medical assessment unit' department.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for hospital. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for the Addenbrookes Hospital. The hospital should have the acute medical assessment unit department
Make sure you get address and phone number
